text: Truly awful. Can't connect to a human being. Just goes round and round.

The app constantly asks you to reload and then takes money from your balance to pay for other things you cancelled. Descriptions of services are misleading. Their operations seem borderline criminal, so I highly recommend anyone reading this not subscribe to a Celcom Digi plan—at least UMobile is not misleading

However, it teach me nothing come for free. It is a bad experience for a big company like celcom to do such a thing.
